element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to match rows/columns of same-colored cookies

element_introduction_order.element: Grid growth (cookies entering from top and right)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player must clear cookies faster than grid fills to prevent overflow

element_introduction_order.element: Yoshi head wild card (6th cookie type)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Acts as universal match to help clear problematic lines

element_introduction_order.element: Puzzle Mode predefined grids with move limits
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Requires strategic planning within strict move constraints
Players can disrupt opponent with their moves; split-screen interaction

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing a complete row or column
Matching multiple cookies of same type
Using Yoshi wild card to resolve difficult arrangements
typical_tension_triggers: Grid growing from top and right edges
Running out of moves in Puzzle Mode
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty escalation with ongoing passive threat (grid growth); in Puzzle Mode, constrained-move structure creates discrete tension cycles per puzzle

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic cookie matching and grid mechanics; low pressure initially
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Grid growth accelerates; Yoshi wild card introduced; complexity increases through Action Mode progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-speed gameplay required; grid fills rapidly; Action Mode levels become challenging
notable_spikes: Transition to Puzzle Mode (introduces hard move limits and predefined strategic puzzles)
Versus Mode difficulty (dependent on opponent skill; multiplayer disruption mechanics)

notable_level_patterns.description: Successive levels grow increasingly complex with faster grid growth and more challenging cookie arrangements
Each level has a preset grid state and maximum move count; requires planning rather than reflexes; designed by Tetris creator Alexey Pajitnov
Two players compete simultaneously with ability to disrupt opponent's field; introduces interactive tension beyond solo mechanics
